name: Bloodlit
short_description: Bloodlit is a first-person shooter designed to unite slow-paced oppressive survival horror tension with fast-paced reflex-driven close-quarters combat. Carve your path through the blood and ruin. Regret is for the dead.
detailed_description:
Be sure to join our official Discord for the latest updates! Feel free to engage with the development by providing your feedback and following plans for the future of the game!

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Bloodlit is a first-person shooter designed to unite slow-paced oppressive survival horror tension with fast-paced reflex-driven close-quarters combat, demanding a relentless, evolving style of play.

The game places players at a stark disadvantage from the beginning — outnumbered, under-equipped, and vulnerable. Success hinges on quick thinking and flawless execution: parry enemy attacks with precision, strike back in brief stun windows, and exploit enemy weaknesses to claw out a few precious seconds of breathing room. Mastery of Bloodlit is not just mechanical — it is mental, requiring players to process information rapidly and adapt their tactics moment to moment.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

The enemies in Bloodlit are relentless and overwhelming. To survive, one must maintain control of imminent danger and chaos without collapsing under the endless pressure.

This is a test of endurance and focus. Let your guard down for even a moment, and their attacks will hit the hardest when you're the most exposed.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Combat in Bloodlit is up close, tense, and technical. Attacks can be countered with precise timing and enemies can be staggered to open up a narrow window to strike back. These follow-up attacks aren't just flashy — they’re often the difference between life and death.

Being outnumbered and surrounded is well expected. Players must rely on sharp reflexes and quick judgment to turn the tide, especially when enemies get closer than comfortable.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Every weapon in Bloodlit is crafted with a clear purpose. Whether it’s raw close-range firepower, precise long-range control, or tools designed to break enemy defenses and set up for melee finishers, each one offers a unique tactical edge.

Choose the tools that suit your instincts, learn their strengths, and push them to their limits.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Yet no matter how skilled you become, escape is an illusion. You are trapped in a cycle of endless violence and suffering — a nightmare you cannot wake from. Because here, in this place drenched in blood, you are not the victim.

You are the architect of your own suffering.
